step_1_catalyst.catalyst_event: FY2025 full-year earnings release expected to confirm first full-year GAAP operating profit, with Tevimbra US/EU label expansion readouts (1L ESCC, 1L gastric IO+chemo) and BRUKINSA ex-US share data versus Calquence/Imbruvica
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_date_or_window: 2026-03-25 (±2 weeks) FY2025 results; Tevimbra label expansion decisions Q1-Q2 2026
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_source: BeOne Medicines IR calendar; FDA/EMA action timelines; company 3Q25 guidance

mechanism_chain: 1. BRUKINSA (zanubrutinib) continues taking US CLL share from Imbruvica and Calquence — already crossed 50% new-patient share in 1L CLL by mid-2025 per IQVIA — driving global revenue toward $3.0B+ in FY2025
2. SG&A/R&D as % of revenue compresses sharply (R&D ratio fell from ~85% in 2022 to ~45% in 1H25) as commercial scale builds, flipping company to GAAP operating profit for FY2025

3. First profitable year removes the 'biotech burning cash' equity-risk-premium discount and re-rates the stock from a price-to-sales (loss-making biotech) framework to price-to-earnings (profitable specialty pharma) framework

4. Re-rating accelerated by Tevimbra label expansions (1L gastric, 1L ESCC, NSCLC adjuvant) layering $500M-$1B incremental revenue trajectory on top of BRUKINSA, validating the multi-asset platform thesis vs single-product story
5. Sotorasib/sonrotoclax (BCL2) Phase 3 readouts in 2026-2027 provide the next pipeline leg, sustaining growth narrative and preventing the 'BRUKINSA-only' bear case from anchoring multiple

evidence_quantitative: BRUKINSA global revenue 1H25 ~$1.4B, +60% YoY; US share of new 1L CLL prescriptions >50% per IQVIA
R&D as % revenue: FY2022 85% → FY2023 65% → FY2024 ~50% → 1H25 ~45% (clear operating leverage curve)
Company guided to FY2025 positive GAAP operating income — first time in history (3Q25 earnings call)
Tevimbra approved in 40+ markets; FDA 1L ESCC approval Mar 2024, 2L NSCLC Mar 2024, 1L gastric Dec 2024
Cash + investments ~$2.6B as of 3Q25; operating cash flow turned positive 1H25
evidence_qualitative: Re-domicile from Cayman to Switzerland (BeOne Medicines) completed 2025, simplifying global capital access and removing China-VIE overhang
BRUKINSA ALPINE head-to-head superiority data vs Imbruvica is best-in-class evidence durable through patent life (2031+)
Pipeline depth: sonrotoclax (BCL2) + BGB-16673 (BTK degrader) provides post-BRUKINSA hematology franchise, addressing 'one-product-company' risk

market_consensus.e: Sell-side consensus (avg PT $255-385 ADR equivalent) views BeiGene as fairly valued: BRUKINSA growth and pipeline progress are already priced in, with neutral-to-hold ratings suggesting limited upside from current levels.
market_consensus.z: 卖方共识 (平均目标价 $255-385 ADR) 认为百济神州估值合理:百利妥的增长和管线进展已基本定价,中性至持有评级暗示当前位置上行空间有限。

our_variant.e: Consensus is anchored on a price-to-sales framework appropriate for a loss-making biotech. We believe FY2025 marks the inflection to GAAP profitability, which mechanically forces buy-side institutions (mutual funds, EM specialty pharma funds) with profitability filters to add the name to their eligible universe — a category-flip re-rating that average-target methodology does not capture.
our_variant.z: 共识锚定在亏损生物科技的市销率框架。我们认为 FY2025 是 GAAP 盈利转折点,这将机械性地迫使带盈利筛选的买方机构(共同基金、新兴市场特种制药基金)将该股纳入可投池——这种类别切换的重估并未被平均目标价方法论捕捉。

contrarian_view.what_changes_our_mind: FY2025 results show GAAP operating loss (not profit) AND BRUKINSA US 4Q25 sequential growth <5% — would invalidate both the profitability inflection and the share-gain durability legs simultaneously.

step_4_quantification.metric_target: FY2025 GAAP operating margin and FY2026 consensus EPS revision
step_4_quantification.current_value: FY2024 GAAP operating margin -22%; FY2025E consensus EPS ~$0.50 ADR
step_4_quantification.predicted_value: FY2025 GAAP operating margin +3% to +5%; FY2026 EPS revised upward 25-40% post FY2025 print

step_5_proves_right_if: FY2025 reported GAAP operating income positive (>$0)
FY2026 consensus EPS revised upward by ≥20% within 60 days of FY2025 print
Tevimbra 1L gastric label expansion approval in EU by Q2 2026
step_6_proves_wrong_if: FY2025 GAAP operating loss (any negative number) reported
BRUKINSA US quarterly revenue growth slows to <10% YoY for 2 consecutive quarters
Sonrotoclax Phase 3 CELESTIAL-TN-CLL primary endpoint miss
FDA Complete Response Letter on any pending Tevimbra label expansion

step_7_variant_view.variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes BeiGene is fairly valued on P/S → We believe FY2025 GAAP profitability inflection triggers buy-side category-flip re-rating → Mechanism is mandate-driven institutional inflows once profitability filter passes.
step_7_variant_view.time_to_resolution: 12 months (FY2025 print March 2026 + 60-90 days for consensus revision)

why_market_keeps_buying: BRUKINSA quarterly prints continue beating (~+50% YoY) reinforcing single-product growth narrative without forcing P/E reframe
Sell-side reluctant to upgrade ahead of FY2025 print; price targets cluster at fair-value as institutions wait for 'proof' rather than anticipate
HK biotech beta provides momentum cover — stock moves with sector, not idiosyncratic re-rating yet
early_signs_phase_1_weakening: 4Q25 pre-announcement (Jan 2026) of preliminary FY2025 revenue ≥$4.6B and positive operating income
First sell-side upgrade citing 'profitability category-shift' rather than DCF tweak
BRUKINSA monthly IQVIA US share data showing >55% in 1L CLL new patients

optional_long_play.exit_trigger: If 4Q25 BRUKINSA US sequential growth <5% or pre-announcement signals operating loss

catalyst_for_reversion: FY2025 results announcement ~2026-03-25 confirming first GAAP operating profit
60-90 day window post-print where consensus FY2026 EPS estimates revised upward 20-40% triggering passive/active mandate inflows
Tevimbra EU 1L gastric approval Q2 2026 validating multi-asset platform
phase_2_reality_recognition.estimated_timing: FY2025 print 2026-03-25 ± 2 weeks; full re-rating completion by Q3 2026

short_play.sizing: n/a — this is a long thesis, no short leg

data.name: 百济神州 / 百利天恒医药

pulse.e: FY2025 marks GAAP profitability inflection; BRUKINSA US share gains durable; consensus anchored on P/S framework misses category-flip re-rating mechanic.
pulse.z: FY2025 是 GAAP 盈利转折年;百利妥美国份额增长可持续;共识锚定市销率框架,错过类别切换重估机制。

problem.e: Global oncology patients need best-in-class targeted therapies (BTK inhibitors, checkpoint inhibitors) at scale; legacy drugs (ibrutinib, pembrolizumab) face efficacy ceilings or pricing pressure.
problem.z: 全球肿瘤患者需要规模化的同类最佳靶向疗法 (BTK 抑制剂、检查点抑制剂);传统药物 (依鲁替尼、帕博利珠单抗) 面临疗效天花板或价格压力。

mechanism.e: BRUKINSA (zanubrutinib) — head-to-head superior to Imbruvica in CLL — captures share globally; Tevimbra (tislelizumab) — PD-1 with differentiated Fc engineering — expands across solid tumor labels; pipeline (sonrotoclax BCL2, BGB-16673 BTK degrader) builds next franchise.
mechanism.z: 百利妥 (泽布替尼) 在 CLL 头对头优于依鲁替尼,全球抢占份额;Tevimbra (替雷利珠单抗) 通过差异化 Fc 工程的 PD-1,在实体瘤适应症扩展;管线 (sonrotoclax BCL2、BGB-16673 BTK 降解剂) 构建下一代特许经营。

moneyFlow.e: Drug sales (BRUKINSA ~70% of product revenue, Tevimbra ~20%, others 10%) → gross margin ~85% → R&D/SG&A leverage → FY2025 first GAAP operating profit → FCF generation FY2026+.
moneyFlow.z: 药品销售 (百利妥占产品收入约 70%、Tevimbra 约 20%、其他 10%) → 毛利率约 85% → 研发/销售管理费用杠杆 → FY2025 首次 GAAP 营业利润 → FY2026+ 自由现金流生成。

marketBelieves.e: Sell-side consensus (avg PT $255-385 ADR) views shares as fairly valued; BRUKINSA growth and pipeline already priced in.
marketBelieves.z: 卖方共识 (平均目标价 $255-385 ADR) 认为股价合理;百利妥增长和管线已被定价。

weBelieve.e: Market believes BGNE is fairly valued on P/S → We believe FY2025 GAAP profitability inflection forces a category-flip re-rating from biotech-loss multiple to specialty pharma P/E multiple → Mechanism is mandate-driven institutional inflows when profitability filter passes (mutual funds, EM specialty pharma funds previously excluded).
weBelieve.z: 市场认为按市销率合理估值 → 我们认为 FY2025 GAAP 盈利转折强制类别切换重估,从亏损生物科技倍数转为特种制药市盈率倍数 → 机制是盈利筛选通过后被授权驱动的机构资金流入 (此前被排除的共同基金、新兴市场特种制药基金)。

mechanism.e: FY2025 first GAAP operating profit → buy-side profitability filters unlock the name → mandate-driven inflows + sell-side framework shift from P/S to P/E → 25-40% upward EPS revisions → multiple expansion.
mechanism.z: FY2025 首次 GAAP 营业利润 → 买方盈利筛选解锁该股 → 授权驱动资金流入 + 卖方框架从市销率切换至市盈率 → EPS 上调 25-40% → 倍数扩张。

rightIf.e: FY2025 GAAP operating income positive AND FY2026 consensus EPS revised upward ≥20% within 60 days of print AND BRUKINSA FY2025 revenue ≥$2.9B.
rightIf.z: FY2025 GAAP 营业利润为正,且 FY2026 共识 EPS 在业绩公布后 60 天内上调 ≥20%,且百利妥 FY2025 收入 ≥$2.9B。

wrongIf.e: FY2025 GAAP operating loss reported (any negative number) → exit position immediately. OR BRUKINSA US quarterly revenue YoY growth <10% for 2 consecutive quarters → exit and re-evaluate.
wrongIf.z: FY2025 报告 GAAP 营业亏损 (任何负值) → 立即退出仓位。或 百利妥美国季度收入 YoY 增长 <10% 连续 2 季度 → 退出并重新评估。

whatChangesOurMind.e: FY2025 results show GAAP operating loss AND BRUKINSA US 4Q25 sequential growth <5% — invalidates both profitability inflection and share-gain durability simultaneously.
whatChangesOurMind.z: FY2025 业绩显示 GAAP 营业亏损,且百利妥美国 4Q25 环比增长 <5% —— 同时证伪盈利转折和份额增长可持续性。

rewardToRisk.timeToResolution: 12 months — FY2025 print March 2026 + 60-90 day consensus revision window

whyMarketKeepsBuying: BRUKINSA quarterly beats (~+50% YoY) reinforce growth narrative without forcing P/E reframe
Sell-side waits for 'proof' rather than anticipating profitability inflection
HK biotech sector beta provides momentum cover; idiosyncratic re-rating not yet underway
earlySignsPhase1Weakening: 4Q25 pre-announcement (Jan 2026) preliminary FY2025 revenue ≥$4.6B + positive operating income
First sell-side upgrade citing 'profitability category-shift' rather than DCF tweak
BRUKINSA monthly IQVIA US share >55% in 1L CLL new patients

optionalLongPlay.exitTrigger: 4Q25 BRUKINSA US sequential growth <5% OR pre-announcement signals operating loss

catalystForReversion: FY2025 results 2026-03-25 confirming first GAAP operating profit
60-90 day post-print consensus FY2026 EPS revisions +20-40%
Tevimbra EU 1L gastric approval Q2 2026 validating multi-asset platform
phase2RealityRecognition.estimatedTiming: FY2025 print ~2026-03-25; full re-rating by Q3 2026

catalysts.e: FY2025 full-year results — first GAAP operating profit confirmation
catalysts.z: FY2025 全年业绩——首次 GAAP 营业利润确认

catalysts.e: Tevimbra EU 1L gastric cancer label expansion decision
catalysts.z: Tevimbra 欧盟一线胃癌标签扩展决定
Sonrotoclax (BCL2) 三期 CELESTIAL-TN-CLL 中期结果
4Q25 业绩预告 (潜在) 初步收入/利润

expectation_gap.e: Consensus EPS underestimates operating leverage in profitability inflection year by 25-40%.
expectation_gap.z: 共识 EPS 在盈利转折年低估营业杠杆 25-40%。

fundamental_acc.e: R&D % revenue compressed from 85% (2022) → 45% (1H25); gross margin stable at 85%; operating margin inflecting positive.
fundamental_acc.z: 研发占收入比从 85% (2022) 压缩至 45% (1H25);毛利率稳定 85%;营业利润率拐正。

narrative_shift.e: Story shifts from 'cash-burning Chinese biotech' to 'profitable global specialty pharma' — different investor base.
narrative_shift.z: 故事从'烧钱的中国生物科技'转变为'盈利的全球特种制药'——投资者基础不同。

low_coverage.e: 97 analysts cover the name; not under-covered, but US-listed ADR vs HK share spread creates analytical lag.
low_coverage.z: 97 位分析师覆盖;并非低覆盖,但美股 ADR 与港股价差产生分析滞后。

catalyst_prox.e: FY2025 results in ~4 months provide hard, dated, asymmetric catalyst.
catalyst_prox.z: FY2025 业绩在约 4 个月后,提供硬性、有日期的不对称催化剂。

risks.e: FY2025 unexpected one-time R&D charge or M&A cost pushes GAAP operating result back to loss, breaking thesis.
risks.z: FY2025 意外的一次性研发支出或并购成本使 GAAP 营业结果回到亏损,破坏论点。

risks.e: Calquence (acalabrutinib) launches improved formulation or gains share in 1L CLL slowing BRUKINSA growth.
risks.z: Calquence (阿卡替尼) 推出改良剂型或在一线 CLL 抢占份额,使百利妥增长放缓。

risks.e: Sonrotoclax Phase 3 readout misses primary endpoint, removing pipeline leg of thesis.
risks.z: Sonrotoclax 三期主要终点未达,移除论点的管线支撑。

risks.e: US-China biotech regulatory tension (BIOSECURE-style legislation) re-emerges, broad biotech multiple compression.
risks.z: 美中生物科技监管紧张 (类似 BIOSECURE 立法) 重现,广泛生物科技倍数压缩。

crowd.e: Mainstream HK biotech holding; not crowded short, not consensus high-conviction long.
crowd.z: 主流港股生物科技持仓;非拥挤空头,亦非共识高信念多头。

nextActions.e: Track monthly IQVIA US BRUKINSA new-patient share in 1L CLL — alert if <55% by Feb 2026.
nextActions.z: 跟踪 IQVIA 美国百利妥一线 CLL 新患者份额月度数据——若 2026 年 2 月低于 55% 则警报。

nextActions.e: Monitor 4Q25 pre-announcement window (Jan 10-20, 2026) for revenue/operating profit guidance.
nextActions.z: 监控 4Q25 业绩预告窗口 (2026 年 1 月 10-20 日) 的收入/营业利润指引。

nextActions.e: Build sensitivity model: FY2025 operating margin from -2% to +6%, target multiple 6x-9x sales OR 35x-50x P/E.
nextActions.z: 建立敏感性模型:FY2025 营业利润率 -2% 至 +6%,目标倍数 6x-9x 市销率或 35x-50x 市盈率。

nextActions.e: Channel checks with 3-5 US oncology KOLs on BRUKINSA vs Calquence in 1L CLL by Feb 2026.
nextActions.z: 2026 年 2 月前与 3-5 位美国肿瘤 KOL 进行渠道访谈,了解一线 CLL 中百利妥与 Calquence 对比。

fin_insights: Operating leverage curve: R&D as % revenue compressed 85% → 78% → 50% → 45% (2022 → 1H25); FY2025E operating margin inflecting from -22% to ~+3%, implying NI growth massively outpacing revenue growth in the inflection year.

Profit scissors widening: revenue +55% YoY FY2024 vs OpEx +12%, narrowing operating loss from -36% to -22% margin; 3-year direction: clear and accelerating margin expansion FY22→FY24 (-143% → -36% → -22%).

Implied valuation reframe: at HK$255B market cap on FY2025E revenue ~$4.85B = ~6.7x sales (biotech P/S framework). On FY2026E EPS ~$0.80 ADR if profitability holds, implies ~38x P/E vs sector specialty pharma 25-30x — premium justified by 30%+ growth profile but vulnerable to growth deceleration.

Balance sheet supports inflection: $2.68B cash + $1.05B debt = net cash $1.6B; runway no longer a survival question. FCF turning positive in 2025 enables capital allocation optionality (BD, buyback) absent for prior 5 years.

consensus_views.thesis: Wall Street consensus rates BeiGene with an average price target reflecting roughly flat upside from current levels, indicating a neutral-to-hold stance on the name at present valuation.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Current commercialization trajectory and pipeline progress are largely priced in at current levels.

consensus_views.thesis: Aggregated analyst coverage tracks 97 price targets with an average target of $255.14, with a historical forecast materialization ratio of ~60.55%, suggesting a broadly constructive but mixed outlook on BeiGene shares.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Historical analyst accuracy (~60%) on BGNE forecasts holds going forward.

consensus_views.thesis: Company-level forward-looking commentary highlights successful commercialization of approved medicines and expansion into additional indications and territories as the central value driver, framing the bull case around execution on label expansion and global approvals.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Successful regulatory approvals in new indications/geographies and continued R&D progress.
